today.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026

today.title: Even a mountain of T-bills won't save Tether and Circle from a sudden liquidity crisis, expert says
today.sum: The head of digital assets and tokenization at one of Germany’s largest asset managers said that USDT and USDC are not stablecoins, from his perspective.

today.title: This bitcoin bear market is different with 'uniquely pessimistic' traders limiting downside, K33 says
today.sum: The research firm said bitcoin traders remain unusually defensive, reducing the risk of the kind of leverage-driven collapse seen in prior downturns.

today.title: The U.S. can’t lose the bitcoin race to China
today.sum: The next global power competition is not being fought over missiles alone. It’s being fought over money, and right now, China is moving aggressively to shape the future of it, argues Gooden.

today.title: Former BNY exec launches NUVA, bets tokenization will remake Wall Street
today.sum: NUVA launched this week with nearly $19 billion in tokenized real-world assets from Figure Technologies, aiming to bring regulated U.S. yield products into DeFi.

today.title: Live markets: Bitcoin gives up $77,000 as interest rates continue surge, stocks continue slump
today.sum: Crypto markets have turned lower in morning U.S. trade on Tuesday as the idea of coming rate hikes takes a toll on risk assets.

today.sum: Plus: Instructure’s Canvas ransomware debacle comes to a close, an alleged dark net market kingpin gets arrested, OpenAI workers fall victim to a supply chain attack, and more.

today.title: Your iPhone Gets Stolen. Then the Hacking Begins
today.sum: A bustling underground ecosystem is providing criminals with the tools to unlock iPhones—and wage phishing attacks against their contacts to access bank accounts and more.

today.title: Foxconn Ransomware Attack Shows Nothing Is Safe Forever
today.sum: Famous for helping build Apple’s iPhones, Foxconn just suffered another cyberattack, highlighting the perils of warehousing some of the world’s most valuable data.

today.title: Hackable Robot Lawn Mower Unlocks a New Nightmare
today.sum: Plus: Meta officially kills encrypted Instagram DMs, the Trump administration targets “violent left wing extremists,” leaked documents reveal Russia's school for elite hackers, and more.
